data.body: AC amendment: Add test_refusal_diagnostic_references_brainstorm to the test file — this structural assertion checks that the Refusal Gate section in SKILL.md references /dso:brainstorm so the diagnostic correctly directs users. This complements T3's acceptance criteria but ensures the RED test drives this requirement. Verify: bash plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/tests/test_external_dep_block_reader.sh; test $? -eq 0 (after T3 adds the section)
